data.title: Netflix Keeps Hitting New Highs: Can TikTok-Style Feed, OpenAI Search Power Even More Growth?
data.description: Netflix is using OpenAI to better recommend selections for users while a new TikTok-style video feed will play clips of hit shows and movies to boost engagement.

data.title: Stagflation Emerges As Key Risk To Fed Policy, Economists Warn: 'We're Grappling With A Rare Trifecta'
data.description: Stagflation, economists warn, is no longer a distant threat but the most probable path ahead for the U.S. economy.

data.title: Chip Stocks Rise As Trump Reportedly Plans To Roll Back Biden-Era AI Export Curbs
data.description: Trump reportedly plans to scrap Biden-era AI chip curbs, boosting major semiconductor stocks. Nvidia, AMD and TSM shares rise after Bloomberg reports the potential policy shift.

data.title: Beyond Meat Reports 'Disappointing' Q1 Results, Issues Soft Guidance Following 'Slowdown' In Consumption, Shares Slide
data.description: Beyond Meat Inc (NASDAQ:BYND) reported first-quarter financial results after the market close on Wednesday. Here's a rundown of the report.
